figures.caption: Figure 3: Solver stability. Histogram of the derivative errors ϵd, calculated from 105 randomly sampled problems using the solvers from Section 4. HC stands for homotopy continuation, GB stands for Gröbner basis. See Section 4 for details.

Figure 5: Real World Experiment. Histogram of the Euclidean triangulation errors. left : m = 2, right : m = 3. On Lamar [Sar+22]. In meters. (P).UC: unconstrained solvers [HS95; BJÅ07], (P).C: solvers constrained to plane (Section 4), (P).H: combinations of both methods. See Section 5.2 for details.

Figure 6: An example of an image from the CAB sequence of the Lamar dataset [Sar+22] captured with the NavVis M6 trolley. left : the image, center : depth detected with a neural network [Yan+24], right : a plane detected in the image.
Figure 4: Triangulation of n = 5 coplanar correspondences for m = 2, 3, 4 cameras over 1000 iterations. Top: logarithmic average relative error. Bottom: runtime distributions.
